title: Verify help drawer works in browser
description: Browser-level verification that the help drawer opens, behaves correctly, and produces no console errors. All checks must fail before the feature is implemented and pass after.
success_criteria: Browser opens the dashboard without error
No console errors on page load
Overlay gains class 'open' when drawer is open
#help-search input is focused after drawer opens
No console errors after opening drawer
Clicking the overlay removes class 'open' from .drawer
notes: Uses JS .click() instead of playwright-cli click for Shoelace sl-icon-button — playwright-cli pierces shadow DOM and misses the host element's onclick attribute.
